description_long: This is a modern passenger train car with a streamlined, rectangular body and a predominantly gray exterior accented by a red and black horizontal stripe along the lower section. The sides feature a series of large, evenly spaced rectangular windows, allowing ample natural light into the passenger compartment. The undercarriage is detailed with visible wheels, suspension components, and access panels, typical of urban or intercity rail vehicles. Both ends of the car are flat and equipped with connection and safety features, such as buffers, lights, and coupling mechanisms. The roof is smooth and slightly curved, with no visible pantographs or overhead wire connectors. The overall design suggests a focus on passenger comfort and efficient boarding in an urban or commuter rail context.
description: A sleek, gray passenger train car with large rectangular windows and red-black striping, designed for urban or commuter rail use. Features detailed undercarriage and flat ends with connection equipment.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat end of the train car with coupling equipment, lights, and a streamlined profile.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a continuous row of large rectangular windows, red and black striping, and detailed undercarriage components.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with coupling and safety features visible, and a smooth, flat end surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the window arrangement and undercarriage details, with consistent striping and design.
